ranking_rationale: cbrt=uses sfpi::exexp+reinterpret<vInt> bit manipulation of IEEE754 floats matching frac core algorithm, hardtanh=clean dst_reg loop template with Converter::as_float and v_if/v_endif structure, hardsigmoid=no-param init with v_if clamp branching and vConst1 usage, hardswish=composite pattern of computing intermediate then combining with original v (analogous to v-trunc(v)), softshrink=three-branch conditional structure with default result initialization analogous to fracs three exponent cases
